new_hire_deadline_text: six months of starting the job
enforcing_agencies: unit of local government or law enforcement agency
required_topics: Definition of human trafficking and commercial exploitation of children
Identification of individuals most at risk for human trafficking
Differences in human trafficking related to lodging, restaurants, and truck stops (for labor vs. sex)
Roles of employees in reporting and responding to human trafficking
reporting_contacts_required: Employees need to know how to report human trafficking
harbor_alliance_actions: Ensure compliance with the training requirements by providing or arranging for third-party approved programs
risks_or_constraints: Potential for fines if non-compliance is discovered and not corrected within 30 days
